# Compatibility & Support Policy

<details>
<summary>How to use this template</summary>

- Define backward/forward compatibility guarantees per interface and client.
- Include lifecycle states (preview, beta, GA, deprecated, retired).
- Map compatibility commitments to monitoring signals and sunset plans.
- Remove this block when publishing.

</details>

## Audience & Scope

- Interfaces covered (API, SDK, CLI, data schemas).
- Customer tiers affected.

## Support Matrix

| Component | Supported Versions | Support Level | Notes |
| --------- | ------------------ | ------------- | ----- |
| | | LTS/Best Effort | |

## Compatibility Guarantees

- **Backward Compatibility:**
- **Forward Compatibility:**
- **Breaking Change Protocol:** (notice periods, approval gates)

## Lifecycle States

| State | Definition | Exit Criteria | Communication |
| ----- | ---------- | ------------- | ------------- |
| Preview | | | |

## Monitoring & Enforcement

- **KPIs:**
- **Alert Thresholds:**
- **Compliance Automation:**

## Decommissioning Process

1. Notify stakeholders with timeline.
2. Provide migration guide and tooling.
3. Monitor adoption and escalate blockers.

## Exceptions

- Process for requesting deviations and approval authorities.

## Review Cadence

- Semiannual review by Platform Council and Release Manager.
